subcodes.first_line: The heaven hath been raised up through this Name, whereby the hearts of the ungodly were made to tremble when the Herald raised His call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفعت السماء من هذا الاسم الذی به اضطربت افئده الفجار اذا نادی المناد
